rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption under §11.13(b) has no relation to §11.141, which governs exemptions for precious metal held in a depository. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A person is entitled to an exemption from taxation of the precious metal that the person owns and that is held in a precious metal depository located in this state
_note: §11.141 addresses precious metal depository exemptions; it is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption in §11.13(b). No conflict identified.
